speaker: agent
text: Hi, this is Riya calling about your loan pre-due reminder. Am I speaking with Ms. Fernandez?

speaker: agent
text: Your installment is due in five days. Before we proceed, I want to walk you through the renewal terms.

speaker: agent
text: The amount due is the same as last month, and late payment adds a small fee.

speaker: agent
text: Great, thanks for confirming. Anything else before we close?
